title: All eyes on RBA official for verdict on federal budget

summary: The Reserve Bank of Australia (RBA) is expected to announce its decision regarding the federal budget soon, which could impact economic policies and interest rates. This announcement is highly anticipated by economists and financial markets.
heading: Banking and Economy
key_points: RBA's decision will influence economic policies.
Interest rates may be affected by the budget verdict.
Economists and markets are closely watching the announcement.
ticker_line: RBA set to reveal federal budget impact soon
